description: Add specific descriptive text to the comment/description fields of the first two waypoints in the loaded Fells Loop dataset. For the first waypoint, enter exactly: "Field station alpha - Trail junction, blazed intersection with spur trail. GPS signal strong. Soil sample FS-001 collected." For the second waypoint, enter exactly: "Field station beta - Rocky outcrop overlook with exposed bedrock. Canopy gap provides clear satellite reception. Photo reference IMG_2847." Export the entire dataset, including waypoints, tracks, and routes, as a GPX file to C:\workspace\output\annotated_fells.gpx.
